scripts.validate:instance: ajv validate --spec=draft2020 --allowUnionTypes -c ajv-formats -s nova.instance.schema.json -r nova.protocol.schema.json -d nova.instance.chris.json
scripts.ci: npm run validate:instance && npm run validate:manifest && npm run resolve | tee handshake.txt && grep -Eq 'status=(DEGRADED|READY|PASS)' handshake.txt
